claim_surfaces.public_safe_note: Repository proof claims only; local validators, tests, receipts, and docs do not prove production health.
Public-copy claim questions only; no access, waitlist, pilot, customer, paid-use, or launch invitation is recorded.
Runtime-proof questions only; no endpoint, uptime, public health, or deployment readiness is claimed.
Legal/business questions only; no legal clearance, company readiness, patent protection, or commercial readiness is claimed.
Customer/pilot questions only; no pilot readiness, customer readiness, intake opening, support opening, or paid access is claimed.
Deployment-claim questions only; no deployment execution, endpoint publication, or deployment readiness is claimed.
Evidence-promotion questions only; no claim promotion is authorized without a later signed witness.
Claim-review handoff draft only; no approval by future reviewers is implied.

next_action: continue separating claim categories locally; do not claim production health, endpoint readiness, customer readiness, pilot readiness, legal clearance, commercial readiness, public launch, compliance certification, external publication, or deployment
